name: The Apprentice's Errand
description: Tinte has been sent to retrieve supplies from the outer settlements alone — a task Seta normally handles himself. The player encounters him struggling with a hostile fauna encounter near the settlement perimeter. Helping him creates a debt; ignoring him closes the recruitment path.

stages.description: Player finds Tinte cornered by a thornback boar near a supply cache.
stages.success_outcome: Player notices Tinte in time to intervene before injury.
stages.failure_outcome: Player arrives after Tinte has already taken a wound.

stages.description: After the encounter resolves, Tinte explains his errand and offers to share the supplies as thanks.
stages.success_outcome: Tinte becomes recruitable as a companion.
